calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-04-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V.Mack, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley.
Petitioner Marcela Ojeda present in pro per for the minor, Audrey Chantal Deutman, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of the MINOR'S name to : Audrey Ojeda Deutman.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-30-2003 Reset To Nov-04-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V.Mack, CSR: Lavon Granger.
Petitioner, Marcela Ojeda present in pro per for the minor Audrey Chantal Deutman, was sworn and examined.
Petitioner was unable to provide the court with Proof Of Publication, this matter is continued to Nov. 4, 2003 at 09:00 a.m. in Dept. 218, for Petitioner to file the Proof Of Publication with the court.
